title: SQLPage configuration
description: Configuration options accepted by SQLPage in sqlpage.json. Every option can also be supplied as an uppercase environment variable.

$schema.description: JSON Schema used to validate this configuration file.

database_url.description: Database connection URL or ODBC connection string.

database_password.description: Database password. When set, overrides a password embedded in database_url.

max_database_pool_connections.description: Maximum number of simultaneous database connections.

database_connection_idle_timeout_seconds.description: Close idle database connections after this many seconds. Use 0 to disable.

database_connection_max_lifetime_seconds.description: Close database connections after this many seconds regardless of activity. Use 0 to disable.

sqlite_extensions.description: SQLite extensions to load when connecting.

listen_on.description: Socket address on which the HTTP server listens. Defaults to 0.0.0.0:8080, or port 443 with https_domain.

port.description: TCP port on which to listen. A Kubernetes service URI is ignored for compatibility.

unix_socket.description: UNIX socket path to listen on instead of TCP.

database_connection_retries.description: Number of database connection retries at startup, five seconds apart.

database_connection_acquire_timeout_seco.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a connection from the database pool.

web_root.description: Directory containing the SQL files served by SQLPage.

configuration_directory.description: Directory containing SQLPage configuration, templates, and migrations.

allow_exec.description: Allow SQL queries to call sqlpage.exec. Enable only when all SQL authors are trusted.

max_uploaded_file_size.description: Maximum uploaded file size in bytes.

oidc_issuer_url.description: Base URL of the OpenID Connect provider.

oidc_client_id.description: OIDC client ID assigned to SQLPage.

oidc_client_secret.description: OIDC client secret assigned to SQLPage.

oidc_scopes.description: Space-separated OIDC scopes requested during authentication.

oidc_protected_paths.description: Path prefixes that require OIDC authentication. Public paths take precedence.

oidc_public_paths.description: Path prefixes excluded from OIDC authentication.

oidc_additional_trusted_audiences.description: Additional trusted OIDC JWT audiences. Null trusts all additional audiences; an empty array trusts only the client ID.

https_domain.description: Domain name for automatic HTTPS with a Let’s Encrypt certificate.

host.description: Public hostname used for OIDC redirect URLs. Defaults to https_domain.

https_certificate_email.description: Email address used when requesting the automatic HTTPS certificate.

https_certificate_cache_dir.description: Directory used to store automatic HTTPS certificates.

https_acme_directory_url.description: ACME directory URL used for automatic HTTPS certificates.

environment.description: Runtime environment, controlling whether detailed errors are shown.

site_prefix.description: URL path prefix from which the site is served. SQLPage normalizes leading and trailing slashes.

max_pending_rows.description: Maximum number of result rows buffered before sending them to the client.

compress_responses.description: Compress HTTP response bodies when supported by the client.

content_security_policy.description: Content-Security-Policy header template. Use {{@csp_nonce}} for SQLPage’s generated nonce.

system_root_ca_certificates.description: Load trusted certificates from the operating system certificate store for sqlpage.fetch.

markdown_allow_dangerous_protocol.description: Allow dangerous URL protocols in Markdown links.

cache_stale_duration_ms.description: Milliseconds for which cached SQL files remain fresh. Defaults to 0 in development and 1000 in production.
